special_mechanics.name: Erik - Speed Running
special_mechanics.description: Erik can run faster than the other two Vikings

special_mechanics.name: Erik - Helmet Bash
special_mechanics.description: Erik can bash through some walls and enemies with his helmet

special_mechanics.name: Erik - Jumping
special_mechanics.description: Erik has the ability to jump

special_mechanics.name: Baleog - Melee Combat
special_mechanics.description: Baleog can kill enemies with his sword in close range

special_mechanics.name: Baleog - Ranged Combat
special_mechanics.description: Baleog can attack from distance with a bow and unlimited arrows, can hit switches from afar

special_mechanics.name: Olaf - Shield Block
special_mechanics.description: Olaf can block enemies and their projectiles with his shield

special_mechanics.name: Olaf - Shield Hang Glider
special_mechanics.description: Olaf can use his shield as a hang glider for aerial movement

special_mechanics.name: Olaf - Shield Platform
special_mechanics.description: Olaf's shield can be used as a platform for other Vikings to stand on, allowing Baleog to traverse and Erik to reach higher areas

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. Wikipedia source documents game mechanics and character abilities qualitatively but does not provide specific physics values (gravity constants, jump velocities, acceleration rates, sub-pixel precision, or frame-by-frame movement data). Movement is described through ability narratives (Erik runs faster, can jump and bash; Baleog can fight; Olaf can shield block and glide) rather than numerical parameters. No technical specifications available.
